privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an OLE-embedded spreadsheet object in an ODT document at /home/ga/Documents/batch_synthesis_report.odt and saving the completed version to /home/ga/Documents/batch_synthesis_report_complete.odt. The embedded spreadsheet must contain a data table with three batches (A, B, C) with input masses (50.0 kg, 48.5 kg, 52.0 kg) and output masses (42.5 kg, 39.2 kg, 49.8 kg). A Yield % column must calculate percentage yields using formulas (Output/Input*100), formatted to exactly 1 decimal place, resulting in values of 85.0%, 80.8%, and 95.8% respectively. The task data is synthetic, created specifically for testing the agent's ability to embed OLE objects and use spreadsheet formulas within LibreOffice Writer.
